No Poverty.reason: No evidence in the course syllabus explicitly or implicitly relates to poverty eradication.

Zero Hunger.reason: No evidence in the course syllabus explicitly or implicitly relates to hunger or food security.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: No evidence in the course syllabus explicitly or implicitly relates to health or well-being.

Quality Education.reason: The course is a graduate-level program (tertiary education, Target 4.3) focused on developing '關鍵技能' for '統計諮詢專家' (relevant skills for employment, Target 4.4). Both targets are strongly and explicitly addressed.

Gender Equality.reason: No evidence in the course syllabus explicitly or implicitly relates to gender equality.

Clean Water and Sanitation.reason: No evidence in the course syllabus explicitly or implicitly relates to water or sanitation.

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: No evidence in the course syllabus explicitly or implicitly relates to energy.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course prepares students for 'productive employment' (Target 8.5) as '統計諮詢專家' and covers '實際的業務決策' and '諮詢管理的實際方面' (Target 8.3), including professional ethics.

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: The course enhances 'scientific research' and 'technological capabilities' (Target 9.5) through '數據分析的核心技巧', '機器學習方法', and '創新統計方法'.

Reduced Inequalities.reason: No evidence in the course syllabus explicitly or implicitly relates to reducing inequalities.

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: No evidence in the course syllabus explicitly or implicitly relates to sustainable cities or communities.

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: No evidence in the course syllabus explicitly or implicitly relates to responsible consumption or production.

Climate Action.reason: No evidence in the course syllabus explicitly or implicitly relates to climate action.

Life Below Water.reason: No evidence in the course syllabus explicitly or implicitly relates to marine life or oceans.

Life on Land.reason: No evidence in the course syllabus explicitly or implicitly relates to terrestrial ecosystems or biodiversity.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The course emphasizes '諮詢服務的職業道德' and '具備專業倫理之知能' (professional ethics), contributing to 'accountable' practices (Target 16.6).

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: The course directly supports 'statistical capacity-building' (Targets 17.18, 17.19) and fosters '溝通技巧' (communication) and '團隊合作' (teamwork) (Target 17.16).
